n: Instance: An Audience with the Doorwards

steps.t: Join Mizâdi and Numûru outside the council chambers.
Enter the council chamber with Mizâdi within the Shorakhúna.
Pick up the sword from the table in the Shorakhúna.
Place the sword on the table in front of Sarâgh, Master of Spears.
Listen to the conversation between the Doorwards and Mizâdi.
Speak with Numûru inside the Shorakhúna.
Speak with Mizâdi inside the Shorakhúna.
Listen to the conversation between Mizâdi and the Doorwards.
